title: mikania pooleana
intro: Mikania pooleana is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly known as the 'Prairie Bells' or 'Climbing Hempvine'. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Mikania pooleana is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mikania pooleana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
